description: Lock issue #38/#67 edge review: photolithography is IC manufacturing/scaling context, not a universal hard prerequisite for the broad 1958 integrated-circuit node.

checks.reason: The 1958 Kilby solid-circuit demonstration predates planar photolithographic manufacturing as the scaling path.
Transistors remain the hard component dependency for the broad IC node.
Semiconductor Devices remain the hard component dependency layer for the broad IC node.
